overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person driving through a rainy neon-lit dystopian city. The player navigates from elevated highways through urban intersections, enters a multi-level parking structure, and emerges into narrow commercial streets lined with holographic advertisements and neon signage.

agents.ego_description: driving on elevated highway in heavy rain, maintaining steady speed behind other vehicles

entered.detail: red metal safety railing running along the right side of the elevated road
industrial electrical infrastructure and pylons visible in the distance
large warehouse structures with flat roofs silhouetted against the rainy sky
rain-slicked road surface with reflections of vehicle headlights

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway during a heavy downpour, with industrial buildings visible through the rain. The road is wet and reflective, with red safety barriers lining the right side and power lines visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with commercial neon signage

events.description: exits elevated highway onto city streets at intersection
stops at red traffic light before proceeding through intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through urban intersections, making turns and stopping at traffic signals while passing neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: car ahead moving through the intersection

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red light at intersection
multi-story buildings with illuminated windows and signage
large illuminated advertisement with pink and blue neon lighting
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the highway into a neon-lit urban intersection, stopping at a red light before proceeding. Commercial buildings line the streets with glowing billboards, and the wet roads reflect the colorful artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level parking structure with concrete ramps

events.description: enters indoor parking garage from street level
slows down while navigating tight ramp descent and parking barriers

agents.ego_description: descending concrete ramps in a multi-level parking garage, navigating around structural columns and barriers

entered.detail: descending spiral ramp with wet concrete surface and yellow line markings
automated barrier arm with orange and white reflective stripes
large concrete support pillars throughout the parking deck
illuminated advertisements mounted on the ceiling of the garage entrance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dimly lit multi-level parking garage, leaving the rain behind. It descends concrete ramps past structural columns and automated barrier gates, with overhead billboards visible at the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits parking garage back onto rain-soaked city street
makes sharp turn navigating through narrow street with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: driving through narrow neon-lit commercial streets, passing pedestrians and navigating around construction barriers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple clothing walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large pink neon sign with Japanese characters on building facade
tropical tree lining the sidewalk of the commercial street
floating 3D holographic displays projecting product advertisements
orange and white striped barriers blocking off part of the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the parking garage, the vehicle returns to the rain-soaked streets lined with vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements. The narrow commercial street features palm trees, construction barriers, and pedestrians walking along the sidewalks beneath the glow of pink and blue neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a bleak industrial highway into the vibrant, neon-soaked heart of a dystopian city. It begins on an elevated highway during a heavy downpour, moving past red safety barriers and power lines over wet, reflective asphalt. As the vehicle exits the highway, the scene opens into a glowing urban intersection where the gray rain blends with the colorful reflections of massive commercial billboards. The camera then shifts into the dim, concrete interior of a multi-level parking garage, descending through structural columns and automated gates to leave the storm behind. Finally, the vehicle emerges back into the rain, gliding down a narrow commercial street lined with holographic advertisements, palm trees, and pedestrians bathed in pink and blue neon light.
